# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

1. Call CAS summary first and then call CAS detailed API as per the following. Details are in the below document. 

[CAS Single OTP Flow (2) (1).pdf](%5BVolt%20LSP%5D%20CAS%20summary%20and%20detailed%20POC/CAS_Single_OTP_Flow_(2)_(1).pdf)

1. All navigation to the next step,error messages, etc should be based on CAS summary response.
2. CAS detailed data is required for Analysis. This should be stored in a table for easier analysis. dtSummary object should be stored in the table. Other items from the CAS detailed response can be ignored.
